headline: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Stock After 80% One-Year Surge Is The Rally Running Out Of Room
summary: If you are wondering whether Interactive Brokers Group at US$90.81 is still reasonably priced after a strong run, the key question is how its current market price compares with different measures of underlying value. The stock has posted returns of 7.6% over the past week, 6.7% over the past month, 35.1% year to date and 80.5% over the last year, with a very large 3 year gain of about 3.6x and a 5 year gain of just under 5x. This naturally raises questions about how much long term upside or...
